requirement_topic.en: Solomon Power / SIEA Grid Connection for BESS — 230/400 V 50 Hz System and Project-Specific Connection Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: Solomon Power / SIEA BESS并网——230/400 V 50 Hz系统及项目专属并网要求
requirement_topic.zht: Solomon Power / SIEA BESS併網——230/400 V 50 Hz系統及項目專屬併網要求

summary.en: Solomon Power (the national electricity utility, also known as the Solomon Islands Electricity Authority, SIEA) is the sole grid owner and operator in the Solomon Islands and the primary technical gatekeeper for grid-connected BESS projects. The Solomon Islands grid operates at 230/400 V 50 Hz — the nominal single-phase voltage is 230 V and the three-phase voltage is 400 V, following the IEC/Australian convention adopted from the colonial-era grid. This is distinct from China's nominal grid of 220/380 V 50 Hz: despite sharing 50 Hz, the voltage levels differ and BESS power conversion systems (PCS) must be re-parameterised accordingly. Solomon Power has a limited published technical regulatory framework; grid-connection requirements for BESS are typically defined in project-level agreements and donor-funded project specifications (World Bank, ADB, Green Climate Fund, European Union, JICA, and SPC are active funders of electrification projects in the Solomon Islands). IEC 62933 (Electrical Energy Storage Systems) series standards — including IEC 62933-2-1 and IEC 62933-5-2 — are referenced in internationally funded BESS project specifications in the Pacific. A comprehensive, publicly accessible Solomon Power technical specification for BESS grid connection had not been confirmed from official sources as of the dataset date; project-specific connection requirements must be obtained directly from Solomon Power / SIEA and the project developer or donor agency.
summary.zh: Solomon Power（国家电力公司，又称所罗门群岛电力局SIEA）是所罗门群岛唯一的电网所有者和运营商，也是并网BESS项目的主要技术把关方。所罗门群岛电网运行参数为230/400 V 50 Hz——单相额定电压230 V，三相电压400 V，遵循殖民时代电网沿用的IEC/澳大利亚惯例。这与中国220/380 V 50 Hz的名义电网不同：尽管共用50 Hz，电压等级存在差异，BESS储能变流器（PCS）须相应重新进行参数配置。Solomon Power已发布的技术监管框架有限；BESS并网要求通常在项目级协议和捐助方资助项目规格中规定（世界银行、亚洲开发银行、绿色气候基金、欧盟、JICA和SPC是所罗门群岛电气化项目的活跃资助方）。IEC 62933（电化学储能系统）系列标准——包括IEC 62933-2-1和IEC 62933-5-2——在太平洋地区国际资助的BESS项目规格中被引用。截至本数据集日期，尚未从官方来源确认Solomon Power公开发布针对BESS并网的全面技术规格；项目专属并网要求须直接向Solomon Power / SIEA及项目开发商或捐助机构获取。
summary.zht: Solomon Power（國家電力公司，又稱索羅門群島電力局SIEA）是索羅門群島唯一的電網所有者和運營商，也是併網BESS項目的主要技術把關方。索羅門群島電網運行參數為230/400 V 50 Hz——單相額定電壓230 V，三相電壓400 V，遵循殖民時代電網沿用的IEC/澳大利亞慣例。這與中國220/380 V 50 Hz的名義電網不同：儘管共用50 Hz，電壓等級存在差異，BESS儲能變流器（PCS）須相應重新進行參數配置。Solomon Power已發布的技術監管框架有限；BESS併網要求通常在項目級協議和捐助方資助項目規格中規定（世界銀行、亞洲開發銀行、綠色氣候基金、歐盟、JICA和SPC是索羅門群島電氣化項目的活躍資助方）。IEC 62933（電化學儲能系統）系列標準——包括IEC 62933-2-1和IEC 62933-5-2——在太平洋地區國際資助的BESS項目規格中被引用。截至本數據集日期，尚未從官方來源確認Solomon Power公開發布針對BESS併網的全面技術規格；項目專屬併網要求須直接向Solomon Power / SIEA及項目開發商或捐助機構獲取。

standards_or_laws: Solomon Power / SIEA — project-level grid-connection agreements (no confirmed comprehensive publicly accessible BESS-specific technical specification as of dataset date — verify directly with Solomon Power / SIEA)

IEC 62933-2-1:2017+AMD1:2021 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Unit Parameters and Testing Methods — General Specification (referenced in internationally funded Pacific BESS project specifications)
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (referenced in internationally funded Pacific BESS project specifications)
Solomon Islands grid: 230/400 V 50 Hz (IEC/Australian convention — single-phase 230 V, three-phase 400 V)

summary.en: China's grid-connection requirements for BESS are governed by GB/T 36558-2023 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems) and GB/T 34120-2017 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network). The PCS (energy storage converter) is assessed under NB/T 42090-2016 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters). Chinese BESS products are validated by grid operators through National Energy Administration (NEA)-authorised procedures. China's grid operates at 50 Hz, 220/380 V (220 V single-phase, 380 V three-phase) — nominally different from Solomon Islands' 230/400 V despite the shared 50 Hz. PCS voltage protection thresholds, ride-through settings, and grid-forming or grid-following firmware parameters configured for China's 220/380 V grid must be re-parameterised for Solomon Islands' 230/400 V grid conditions before any grid-connection testing or commissioning.
summary.zh: 中国BESS并网要求由GB/T 36558-2023（电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件）和GB/T 34120-2017（电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范）管控。储能变流器（PCS）依据NB/T 42090-2016（储能变流器检测技术规程）进行评估。中国BESS产品通过国家能源局（NEA）授权程序获得电网运营商认可。中国电网运行参数为50 Hz、220/380 V（单相220 V、三相380 V）——尽管共用50 Hz，名义电压仍与所罗门群岛230/400 V不同。针对中国220/380 V电网配置的PCS电压保护阈值、穿越参数及构网或跟网固件参数，须在任何并网测试或调试前重新针对所罗门群岛230/400 V电网条件进行参数配置。
summary.zht: 中國BESS併網要求由GB/T 36558-2023（電力系統電化學儲能系統通用技術條件）和GB/T 34120-2017（電化學儲能系統接入配電網技術規範）管控。儲能變流器（PCS）依據NB/T 42090-2016（儲能變流器檢測技術規程）進行評估。中國BESS產品通過國家能源局（NEA）授權程序獲得電網運營商認可。中國電網運行參數為50 Hz、220/380 V（單相220 V、三相380 V）——儘管共用50 Hz，名義電壓仍與索羅門群島230/400 V不同。針對中國220/380 V電網配置的PCS電壓保護閾值、穿越參數及構網或跟網韌體參數，須在任何併網測試或調試前重新針對索羅門群島230/400 V電網條件進行參數配置。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)
GB/T 34120-2017 — 电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network)
NB/T 42090-2016 — 储能变流器检测技术规程 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection certificates and NEA approvals do not satisfy Solomon Power / SIEA grid-connection requirements. Critical differences requiring attention: (a) grid voltage — Solomon Islands is 230/400 V whereas China is 220/380 V; despite the shared 50 Hz frequency, PCS voltage protection thresholds and ride-through settings must be reconfigured and retested for the Solomon Islands' 230 V single-phase and 400 V three-phase parameters — do not assume voltage compatibility from frequency match; (b) Solomon Power project-specific connection requirements — engage Solomon Power / SIEA at the earliest project stage to obtain technical connection requirements before equipment specification is finalised; (c) IEC 62933 compliance — where donor or project specifications require IEC 62933-2-1 or IEC 62933-5-2 evidence, prepare test and design documentation accordingly as Chinese GB/T standards are not accepted as equivalent by international donor agencies or project owners; (d) communication and SCADA protocols — confirm what monitoring interface protocol Solomon Power requires for BESS installations; (e) limited conformity regime — Solomon Islands does not have a functioning mandatory product certification regime for BESS; project-level and donor-level requirements are the operative gatekeepers.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T BESS并网证书和NEA审批不满足Solomon Power / SIEA并网要求。需注意的关键差异：（a）电网电压——所罗门群岛为230/400 V，中国为220/380 V；尽管共用50 Hz频率，PCS电压保护阈值和穿越参数须针对所罗门群岛单相230 V和三相400 V参数重新配置并测试——不可因频率相同而假设电压兼容；（b）Solomon Power项目专属并网要求——在设备规格最终确定前，应在项目最早阶段与Solomon Power / SIEA接触以获取技术连接要求；（c）IEC 62933合规——若捐助方或项目规格要求IEC 62933-2-1或IEC 62933-5-2证据，须相应准备测试和设计文件，因为国际捐助机构和项目业主不接受中国GB/T标准为等效依据；（d）通信和SCADA协议——确认Solomon Power对BESS安装所要求的监控接口协议；（e）合格评定制度有限——所罗门群岛尚无针对BESS的正常强制产品认证制度；项目级和捐助方级要求是实际把关机制。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T BESS併網證書和NEA審批不滿足Solomon Power / SIEA併網要求。需注意的關鍵差異：（a）電網電壓——索羅門群島為230/400 V，中國為220/380 V；儘管共用50 Hz頻率，PCS電壓保護閾值和穿越參數須針對索羅門群島單相230 V和三相400 V參數重新配置並測試——不可因頻率相同而假設電壓兼容；（b）Solomon Power項目專屬併網要求——在設備規格最終確定前，應在項目最早階段與Solomon Power / SIEA接觸以獲取技術連接要求；（c）IEC 62933合規——若捐助方或項目規格要求IEC 62933-2-1或IEC 62933-5-2證據，須相應準備測試和設計文件，因為國際捐助機構和項目業主不接受中國GB/T標準為等效依據；（d）通訊和SCADA協議——確認Solomon Power對BESS安裝所要求的監控接口協議；（e）合格評定制度有限——索羅門群島尚無針對BESS的正常強制產品認證制度；項目級和捐助方級要求是實際把關機制。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in project practice — Solomon Power / SIEA grid-connection approval is required for all grid-connected BESS; technical requirements are project-specific; no comprehensive public BESS grid-connection specification confirmed as of dataset date — verify directly with Solomon Power / SIEA
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 36558 and NEA grid-operator approval procedures are mandatory for grid-connected BESS in China; not transferable to Solomon Islands

source.publisher: Solomon Power (Solomon Islands Electricity Authority — SIEA)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection compliance and NEA approvals do not satisfy Solomon Power / SIEA grid-connection requirements. BESS PCS must be re-parameterised for Solomon Islands' 230/400 V at 50 Hz — the voltage levels differ from China's 220/380 V despite the shared 50 Hz frequency; do not assume voltage compatibility from frequency match alone. Solomon Islands has a limited published technical regulatory framework; engage Solomon Power / SIEA at the earliest project stage to determine connection requirements, applicable IEC 62933 evidence, and SCADA protocol specifications. For internationally donor-funded projects (World Bank, ADB, GCF, EU, JICA, SPC), confirm whether project specifications require IEC 62933 system-level documentation and obtain it from an ILAC-accredited laboratory.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T BESS并网合规和NEA审批不满足Solomon Power / SIEA并网要求。BESS储能变流器须重新针对所罗门群岛230/400 V 50 Hz进行参数配置——尽管共用50 Hz频率，电压等级与中国220/380 V存在差异；不可仅凭频率相同而假设电压兼容。所罗门群岛已发布的技术监管框架有限；应在项目最早阶段与Solomon Power / SIEA接触，确定并网要求、适用IEC 62933证据及SCADA协议规格。对于国际捐助方资助的项目（世界银行、亚洲开发银行、GCF、欧盟、JICA、SPC），请确认项目规格是否要求IEC 62933系统级文件，并从ILAC认可实验室取得。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T BESS併網合規和NEA審批不滿足Solomon Power / SIEA併網要求。BESS儲能變流器須重新針對索羅門群島230/400 V 50 Hz進行參數配置——儘管共用50 Hz頻率，電壓等級與中國220/380 V存在差異；不可僅憑頻率相同而假設電壓兼容。索羅門群島已發布的技術監管框架有限；應在項目最早階段與Solomon Power / SIEA接觸，確定併網要求、適用IEC 62933證據及SCADA協議規格。對於國際捐助方資助的項目（世界銀行、亞洲開發銀行、GCF、歐盟、JICA、SPC），請確認項目規格是否要求IEC 62933系統級文件，並從ILAC認可實驗室取得。
